content.en:
Hall of Void Source.

Ten Sons of the Void came here, and at this time, Ye Tian found that among the other ten Sons of the Void, there were only five third-class invincibles, two second-class invincibles, one first-class invincible, and two supreme ones.

The ten children of the void did not speak, and were soon teleported to the space where the Void Source Monument was located by the machine spirits of the Void Source Palace.

In a void space, a huge Void Source Monument sits here.

In the vicinity of the Void Source Monument, there are ten small spaces, each representing a seat.

Whoa!!

Ye Tian appeared in a small space, and other children of the void also entered other small spaces.

As soon as he entered this small space, Ye Tian clearly sensed the extraordinaryness here, and the endless eternal rules seemed to be presented in front of him, as if he was inside the Void Source Monument, and he sensed the eternal rules contained inside the Void Source Monument all the time.

"Enlightenment!"

Ye Tian immediately sat cross-legged and began to comprehend the eternal rules.

The Void Source Tablet requires 500 points to participate in enlightenment once, which means that if there is no other point income, the points obtained by becoming a child of the void are only enough to participate in enlightenment twice.

Therefore, for him, any opportunity to comprehend the Void Source Monument was extremely precious.

He even wanted to directly condense the Void Source Body just by using this opportunity to comprehend.

Others once comprehended the Void Source Monument, naturally they had no chance to condense the Void Source Body, but Ye Tian was different, he had a large number of Eternal Ancestral Endowments, which was enough to comprehend a Great Tribulation Era, which was already an incomparably long time for him.

Therefore, he felt that he had a great deal of confidence in directly condensing the Void Source Body.

Time passes slowly –

The eternal rules of time, the eternal rules of space, the eternal rules of gold, the eternal rules of wood, the eternal rules of water......

Eternal rules are growing at an incredible rate, far faster than the other children of the void.

I have to say that the Eternal Ancestor Fu and the Void Source Monument are really wonderful.

And with the advancement of the eternal rules, coupled with the Void Source Monument, Ye Tian's perception of the invincible body robbery is also getting deeper and deeper, and he gradually understands the defects of the Ten Thousand Sources Returning to the Ruins.

In the past, he felt that the invincible body robbery of Wanyuan Guiru was very awesome, and he improved step by step, and the strength of his physical body far surpassed that of other invincible people.

But now, he felt that the Wanyuan Returning Ruins was also relatively ordinary, and if he took a little time, he could also create a variety of top-notch invincible body robbery methods comparable to the Wanyuan Guirus.

A long time has passed, which is equivalent to about half of the time of the Great Tribulation.

And at this time, Ye Tian's attainments of various eternal rules no longer knew how many times he had surpassed before.

He decided to start creating a Void Source Body Method.

In fact, each of the Children of the Void eventually created the Void Source Body, but they were not the same as each other.

Some of the Void Sons of the Void have more ordinary Void Source Bodies, while some of the Void Sons of the Void Void Origin Bodies are extremely powerful.

And Ye Tian was ready to condense a top-notch Void Source Body, and he had this potential.

After all, there is only one Son of the Void who has a large number of Eternal Ancestral Endowments like him, so he has comprehended the Void Source Monument once, which is equivalent to the Void Source Body that others have comprehended countless times.

For example, his current understanding of the rules of eternity, those supreme beings are inferior to him.

If this is the case, he will not be able to create a top-notch Void Source Body, and the other Void Children will probably have no hope.

A dark time passed, and Ye Tian initially created a Void Source Body Method.

So, he asked the copy body of the outside world to start cultivating this Void Source Body, so as to find out the flaws in it.

This is also the reason why Ye Tian asked the body to comprehend the Void Source Monument and copy the body to stay in the outside world.

Because he didn't dare to come to the main body to experiment, he could only let the copy body experiment, but if the copy body cultivated here, once the failure caused the copy body to have a big problem and collapse, wouldn't it be a waste of this opportunity to participate in enlightenment?

Soon, the results of the cultivation came out.

"Sure enough, it's flawed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The initial creation of the Void Source Body probably has more than 10,000 defects, and his current purpose is to perfect and make up for these defects, so as to make the Void Source Body extremely perfect.

Another dark time has passed, and at this time, Ye Tian has made up for many defects, leaving only more than 100 defects, but the defects behind are becoming more and more difficult to make up.

In desperation, Ye Tian comprehended the Void Source Monument while improving it.

As time passed, there was less and less time left, but there were still many loopholes left in the Void Source Body.

Finally, on this day, the time for the Void Source Tablet to comprehend came to an end.

"The time has come for all the children of the void to come to enlightenment!"

Airplanes!

Ye Tian found that he had been moved out by the Void Source Palace's Instrument Spirit.

"It's a pity!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

There was not enough time, and he still had six deficiencies that had not yet been fully filled.

Perhaps for the other children of the void, being able to create the Void Source Body was already extremely satisfying, and they didn't care about the six defects.

However, Ye Tian was ready to continue to improve.

Although without the help of the Void Source Monument, it would be very simple for him to perfect the Void Source Body, and it would even take countless hours, but if he copied his body and experimented again and again, he would still be able to hold on.

Before coming out of the Void Source Palace, he applied to participate in the Void Source Monument again, but because he had participated in the Void Source Monument once, it would take him longer to queue this time, and he was already in line after the 126th Great Tribulation.

That is, there are still 1,260 Void Children lined up in front.

After coming out of the Void Source Palace, Ye Tian immediately entered retreat and penance, studying and perfecting the Void Source Body every day.

One great tribulation after another has passed, and unconsciously, the human race has occupied many exotic worlds, and countless ancestors have been born, and even Ye Tian's wives and children have also embarked on the tribulation realm, preparing to cross the tribulation in the flesh one by one to become invincible.

With Ye Tian's help, their hope of becoming invincible is naturally great.

More than a dozen Great Tribulation Chronicles have passed, Xiao Yue has become a sixth-rank invincible, and Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue have also become sixth-rank invincibles, but their talents are limited, so they are only sixth-rank invincibles who have achieved sixth-rank tribulation realm achievements.

For them, this is very satisfying.

In the sixty-eighth Great Tribulation Era when Ye Tian returned from the Void Source Palace, Ye Tian finally made up for the last flaw in the Void Source Body.

He succeeded in creating the most perfect top-notch Void Source Body.

He named it the Endless Body!
